childrenProjectsJson.description: A React PWA that can control your Spotify playback. The app uses a Node.js server for authentication and authorization. Playback icons were made by me.
childrenProjectsJson.title: Spotify Remote

childrenProjectsJson.description: Simple Tetris game made using JavaScript and styled to mimic the knockoff handheld consoles of the 90s.
childrenProjectsJson.title: Super Brick Game

childrenProjectsJson.description: A weather PWA that shows weather conditions by search or by using the device's location. Made using React.
childrenProjectsJson.title: Weather App
